diagrams.title: Client-Server Architecture
diagrams.description: Basic two-tier architecture showing clients requesting services from servers via network
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how clients and servers interact in a distributed system, understanding the asymmetric relationship

diagrams.title: CAP Theorem Triangle
diagrams.description: Visual representation showing that during network partitions, a system must choose between Consistency or Availability
diagrams.purpose: Understand fundamental trade-off in distributed system design - Partition tolerance is required, forcing choice between C and A

diagrams.title: Middleware Position in Architecture
diagrams.description: Layered view showing middleware between OS/network and application layer
elements: Arrows showing data flow through layers
diagrams.purpose: Understand middleware's role in providing transparency and hiding heterogeneity from developers
